parameters: Ngh... I've always loved Bohelos's Estate, and I've only just
managed to land a job working here...
To think it's been made into the demon's stronghold! It's a disgrace!
I never knew the estate's piano sounded so lovely.
Hey, I'll let you play the piano, but only occasionally. I don't like to
admit it, but you play really well.
Here, take this... Just take it!
The piano's a hundred years old. I've maintained it, but I'd never
It made me so happy to hear such a nice sound come out of it, but
the fact that a demon was playing means I deduct a hundred points.
I'd put plates up so people could understand the long pedigrees
And that brat told me to get rid of them all! What about the
venerable history contained within this estate!?
If you want a chair to park your ass in, just go buy one at the
Ugh! Another person to clean up after! Have some consideration for
Who's the new person? Hanna, was it? I guess it can't be helped,
since other countries would turn her into a slave.
Ah, that's right! I heard there's been a horrible massacre!
Hey, this isn't some hostel for homeless people. Stop collecting
vagrants and letting them live here.
Still, after unraveling some of the history of the estate, it seems
that Bohelos herself used to let refugees live here.
Ugh! I hate how that only makes me want to work even harder!
The demons aren't doing it out of the goodness of their hearts!
I heard you conquered Mark 6. That's all well and good, but I can't
shake this bad feeling in the pit of my stomach.
You're not going to hand this place over to the Aubades, right?
Absolutely not! There's no telling what some alien from another
world might do to the place!
Maximus, Orphe... Slaves from all over have come here,
saying Deathpolca told them to do so.
I told you this wasn't a homeless shelter, didn't I!? Stop sending all
Still, they cried their eyes out when they ate the food I cooked for
them... No, that shouldn't make me happy!
When some of the berserk demons attacked me, the other demons
I'm grateful to them, but only them. They fought a difficult battle
to prevent even more people from dying.

*Sigh*... Saint Bohelos must be crying rivers of tears seeing these
people stinking up her lovely estate.
Although... They've lost everything. The one thing they need most
is a safe roof over their heads.
I'm sorry, Saint Bohelos. I've failed in my duty as caretaker

Saint Bohelos descended upon this unclean land. She gathered the

Records show she traveled the continent and helped enact reform in
many countries. She laid the foundations for several governments.

Huh... Demons can save humans sometimes, I guess.

Give the beautiful sahuagin one hundred thousand iru?
I'll make the best bath ever! You just sit there and watch!

No need for words! You just take your time enjoying the beautiful bath!

The Empire really has its hand around the throat of those who

Discussions about Mark 6 are always hard going. It's to be expected,

Still, we're companions who've suffered together! As long as we
remember that, we can learn to live together!
